decision-tree.root-question: What is the dominant content type in the corpus?

branch.conclusion: Skip this methodology. Load chunking-code-ast for AST-based function/class splitting.
Skip this methodology. Load chunking-document-structure for header / tag-aware splitting.
Apply recursive splitter with chunk_size=1200, overlap=150. Enforce r1-tiktoken-measure, r5-metadata-at-creation, r6-content-based-ids.
Apply sentence splitter with chunk_size=300, overlap=60 (20%). Enforce r1, r5, r6.
Apply recursive splitter with chunk_size=500, overlap=50 (default band). Enforce r1, r5, r6.

example.p: Corpus of contract PDFs (prose, legal). → r2-default-band → recursive splitter 1200/150 with tiktoken measurement and content-based IDs.
